subcodes.first_line: God knoweth that sighs are about to ascend and tears to fall in separation from you. The servant beareth witness that separation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علم الله تکاد الزفرات تصعدو العبرات تنزل فی فراقکم یشهد الخادم بان الهجر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for unity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
